LAW AND MOTION 302, RICHARD C. SINCLAIR, ESQ. MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR DEFENDANT LINDA CATRON). THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MOVING PARTY PROVIDED COURTESY COPIES OF HIS MOTION INCLUDING A PROOF OF SERVICE. HOWEVER, COUNSEL DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE TENTATIVE RULING RULE RE GIVING PROPER NOTICE OF HIS INTENT TO APPEAR AT THIS HEARING. THEREFORE, THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO 05/16/11 AT 9:30AM. COUNSEL TO GIVE NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA, CSR #5153

RICHARD C. SINCLAIR, ESQ. MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR DEFENDANT LINDA CATRON).

APPEARANCES: Richard C. Sinclair, Esq. 209/847-8788 moving to be relieved as counsel for deft; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

MINI MINUTES:
RICHARD C. SINCLAIR, ESQ. MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR DEFENDANT LINDA CATRON).

APPEARANCES: Richard C. Sinclair, Esq. 209/847-8788 moving to be relieved as counsel for deft; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling as moving party provided courtesy copies of his motion including a proof of service. However, counsel did not comply with the tentative ruling rule re giving proper notice of his intent to appear at this hearing. Therefore, the Court continued the matter to 05/16/11 at 9:30am. Counsel to give notice of continuance. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153
